diff --git a/app/api/routes/health.py b/app/api/routes/health.py
index a1b2c3d..e5f6g7h 100644
--- a/app/api/routes/health.py
+++ b/app/api/routes/health.py
@@ -7,12 +7,16 @@
 from __future__ import annotations
 
 import httpx
+import time
+from datetime import datetime
 
 from fastapi import APIRouter
 
 from app.core.config import get_settings
 from app.core.logging import get_logger
 from app.rag.vector_store import ChromaStore
+
+START_TIME = time.time()
 
 logger = get_logger(__name__)
 router = APIRouter(prefix="/api/health", tags=["health"])
@@ -47,11 +51,14 @@
         logger.warning("ChromaDB health check failed: %s", exc)
 
     status = "ok" if (ollama_ok and chroma_ok) else "degraded"
+    uptime_seconds = int(time.time() - START_TIME)
+    
     return {
         "status": status,
         "ollama": ollama_ok,
         "chromadb": chroma_ok,
         "llm_model": settings.OLLAMA_LLM_MODEL,
         "embed_model": settings.OLLAMA_EMBED_MODEL,
+        "uptime": f"{uptime_seconds}s",
+        "server_time": datetime.now().isoformat(),
     }

scenarios.title: Verify Successful Health Check Response
scenarios.description: Ensure the /api/health endpoint returns a 200 status and indicates both Ollama and ChromaDB are operational when services are running correctly.
preconditions: Ollama service is running and reachable at OLLAMA_BASE_URL
scenarios.expected_result: JSON response body should be {'ollama': true, 'chromadb': true}

scenarios.title: Handle Ollama Service Unreachable
scenarios.description: Verify the health check reports 'ollama: false' when the Ollama service is down or the connection is refused.
preconditions: Ollama service is stopped or firewall blocks the port
scenarios.expected_result: Response contains {'ollama': false} and system logs a warning regarding the connection failure.

scenarios.title: Ollama Service Request Timeout
scenarios.description: Ensure the health check does not hang indefinitely if Ollama is unresponsive, respecting the 3.0s timeout.
preconditions: Network latency is introduced making OLLAMA_BASE_URL/api/tags respond in > 3 seconds
scenarios.expected_result: The request returns within ~3 seconds with {'ollama': false} due to the httpx timeout logic.

scenarios.title: Ollama Service Returns Non-200 Status
scenarios.description: Verify that if Ollama returns an error code (e.g., 500 or 404), the health status identifies it as not OK.
preconditions: Ollama service is reachable but /api/tags endpoint returns a 500 Internal Server Error
scenarios.expected_result: The response field 'ollama' is false because status_code != 200.

scenarios.title: ChromaDB Initialization Failure
scenarios.description: Verify health status when ChromaDB vector store fails to initialize.
preconditions: ChromaDB storage directory is read-only or corrupted

scenarios.title: Invalid HTTP Method for Health Endpoint
scenarios.description: Verify that the health check endpoint only allows GET requests and properly rejects other methods.
scenarios.expected_result: Server returns 405 Method Not Allowed for non-GET requests.

scenarios.title: Ollama Base URL Configuration Error
scenarios.description: Check behavior when OLLAMA_BASE_URL is set to an invalid URL format.
preconditions: OLLAMA_BASE_URL is set to 'not-a-url' in environment settings
scenarios.expected_result: The try/except block handles the invalid URL exception and returns {'ollama': false}.

generated_specs.content:
import os
import time
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect

BASE_URL = os.environ.get("BASE_URL", "http://localhost:8000")
HEALTH_ENDPOINT = f"{BASE_URL}/api/health"

# SCENARIO_ID: 7d5e38d9-dfbd-4215-9c20-93f1b2072569
def test_health_check_returns_success_when_services_operational(page: Page):
    """Ensure the /api/health endpoint returns a 200 status and indicates both Ollama and ChromaDB are operational."""
    # Navigate as required by instructions, though this is an API test
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    
    response = page.request.get(HEALTH_ENDPOINT)
    
    expect(response).to_be_ok()
    payload = response.json()
    assert payload.get("ollama") is True
    assert payload.get("chromadb") is True

# SCENARIO_ID: 60ebbe3f-bcbf-47fd-b0d4-03ee20d6ce29
def test_health_check_reports_ollama_offline(page: Page):
    """Verify the health check reports 'ollama: false' when the Ollama service is down."""
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    
    response = page.request.get(HEALTH_ENDPOINT)
    
    expect(response).to_be_ok()
    payload = response.json()
    assert payload.get("ollama") is False

# SCENARIO_ID: 254abea1-b7c3-43ed-b71e-a88494ad1cb6
def test_health_check_handles_ollama_timeout(page: Page):
    """Ensure the health check does not hang indefinitely if Ollama is unresponsive."""
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    
    start_time = time.perf_counter()
    response = page.request.get(HEALTH_ENDPOINT)
    end_time = time.perf_counter()
    
    duration_ms = (end_time - start_time) * 1000
    
    expect(response).to_be_ok()
    assert duration_ms <= 4000, f"Response took too long: {duration_ms}ms"
    assert response.json().get("ollama") is False

# SCENARIO_ID: 5c1e44f8-e74d-4c97-a095-e43a9f8b5030
def test_health_check_reports_ollama_error_status(page: Page):
    """Verify that if Ollama returns an error code, the health status identifies it as not OK."""
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    
    response = page.request.get(HEALTH_ENDPOINT)
    
    expect(response).to_be_ok()
    assert response.json().get("ollama") is False

# SCENARIO_ID: aa7ae79a-4c03-465a-a580-148baac13b7a
def test_health_check_reports_chromadb_initialization_failure(page: Page):
    """Verify health status when ChromaDB vector store fails to initialize."""
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    
    response = page.request.get(HEALTH_ENDPOINT)
    
    expect(response).to_be_ok()
    assert response.json().get("chromadb") is False

# SCENARIO_ID: 89c2f442-08e2-4237-ad4d-078d9369054e
def test_health_endpoint_rejects_invalid_http_methods(page: Page):
    """Verify that the health check endpoint only allows GET requests."""
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    
    # Test POST
    post_response = page.request.post(HEALTH_ENDPOINT)
    assert post_response.status == 405
    
    # Test DELETE
    delete_response = page.request.delete(HEALTH_ENDPOINT)
    assert delete_response.status == 405
    
    # Playwright's expect for APIResponse status check
    expect(post_response).not_to_be_ok()

# SCENARIO_ID: 8fcb564a-c750-4224-986c-f94b823198d0
def test_health_check_handles_invalid_ollama_url_config(page: Page):
    """Check behavior when OLLAMA_BASE_URL is set to an invalid URL format."""
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    
    response = page.request.get(HEALTH_ENDPOINT)
    
    expect(response).to_be_ok()
    assert response.json().get("ollama") is False
"
